task: Using only the supplied embedded packet, separate confirmed failures from warnings, compute the economic/safety margin, identify the evidence that controls the final decision, and produce k8s_blast_radius_report.md and access_matrix.csv. Deliverables must include formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes (including a 5% sensitivity check), and a final decision table. Follow named thresholds exactly; do not impute missing values or use outside data; remediation options may be combined only if total cost <= remediation_budget_usd; mark unresolved ambiguities as needs_review; set expert_review flag if any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift.
